title: Zig-a-zig-ah: Tiny Cryptic #6
summary: Sixth instalment in our series of extremely small and free-form cryptic crossword puzzles, themed on our latest essay.
full_text:
The sixth instalment in our series of extremely small and free-form cryptic crossword puzzles, published every two weeks to coincide with our latest essay on which the puzzle will be themed.

Scroll through the whole page to download all images before printing.

Across3. Remove tie (4)
7. Dispute (a lot of noise, loud) about dividing fence (10)
8. Byzantine pots, some mania for ancient people (13)

9. At bowl of beer nuts, site where tongues were last united (5, 2, 5)

Down1. Naughty sex (kinky, etc.) with professional behind building? (9)
2. Some withdraw emotionally to get respect (3)
4. Evidence of excitement building? (8)
5. Thermopylae oddly chosen as site of worship (6)
6. Awakening about 5:15am, missing Mass, first of liturgies (7)

See all the puzzles in the series here.
